team_name: TenderEval AI — Anti-Cartel Forensic Tender Evaluation for Government Procurement
summary: AI-based tender evaluation and eligibility analysis platform for government procurement
key_steps: Ingest tender document and extract eligibility criteria
Produce explainable, per-criterion verdict with source-page anchoring
Cross-reference bidder claims with live government databases
optimization_claims: 10x faster evaluation with zero silent disqualifications
Tamper-proof, explainable evaluations with source-linked verdicts
Automated cartel detection across historical tenders
Complete audit trail for every procurement decision
constraints_addressed: Manual, opaque, and vulnerable tender evaluation process
Genuine bidders getting disqualified for minor formatting issues
Cartels submitting coordinated bids through shell companies
Procurement irregularities constituting the largest category of corruption complaints
